durable_residue.learned constraint: Active planning promotion is cheaper when agents use one canonical active owner shape; mixing active.execplans and todo.active_items for the same lane creates duplicate projection pressure.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Future lane promotion should prefer the checked-in schema/examples or the promote command instead of guessing state.toml shape.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: If duplicate active projections recur, create a small planning ergonomics issue for a safer promotion affordance.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Roadmap refs now route archived continuations directly, and cli_compatibility output has typed startup/report schema coverage.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused tests, affected suites, root tests, ruff, planning doctor, and reconcile passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Dogfooding found active state promotion-shape sensitivity; corrected locally and left no blocking residue.
execution_summary.resume from: After issue closeout and evidence refresh, return to memory-operating-loop.

signals found: Active planning state with both active.execplans and todo.active_items created duplicate active items and blocked planning_record.

signals routed: If active work_items promotion is used again, add archive cleanup coverage for work_items active lanes.
